name: Constellation Copilot
description: AI agent for Synozur's Constellation consulting delivery platform. Provides read and write access to projects, portfolio, estimates, time tracking, expenses, RAIDD logs, status reports, financials, clients, and M365/Teams context.

skills.name: Project Delivery
skills.description: Query active and historical projects including budget health, deliverables, milestones, team allocations, and linked Microsoft 365 / Teams context.
examples: List all active projects for client Acme
What is the budget utilization for project PROJ-042?
Show me the deliverables at risk on the Contoso engagement

skills.name: Portfolio View
skills.description: Cross-project portfolio visibility including timeline, capacity planning, and aggregated RAIDD entries across all projects.
examples: Which projects are ending in the next 30 days?
Show me the portfolio timeline filtered to client Fabrikam

skills.name: RAIDD Tracking
skills.description: Query Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies, and Decisions for a specific project or across the entire portfolio. Filter by type, status, and priority.
examples: List all open critical risks on project PROJ-010
Show me all unresolved issues across the portfolio
What decisions have been logged for the Northwind project?

skills.name: Status Reporting
skills.description: Retrieve aggregated project health data and saved status reports. Provides period-based summaries of hours, expenses, team activity, RAIDD, and milestones suitable for report generation.
examples: Get the status report data for project PROJ-007 for the last two weeks
List the published status reports for the Contoso engagement

skills.name: Time & Expenses
skills.description: View time entries, team assignments, and expense reports. Supports filtering by person, project, date range, and status.
examples: How many billable hours did the team log last week on project PROJ-003?
Show me pending expense reports submitted by Jane Smith
What projects am I assigned to this month?

skills.name: Financial Reporting
skills.description: Access invoice batches and financial aggregations grouped by month, quarter, client, or project. Requires billing-admin or executive role.
examples: Show Q1 invoicing totals grouped by client
List all invoices raised for Fabrikam in the last 6 months

skills.name: Estimates
skills.description: Read existing estimates and create new ones using three methods: AI-generated from a narrative description, a single block-of-hours line item, or a fixed-price phase breakdown. Includes duplicate detection and dry-run preview.
examples: Create an estimate for Acme Corp for a 6-week data migration project
Show me all draft estimates for client Northwind
Create a fixed-price estimate with three phases totaling $120,000
What is the total fees on estimate EST-019?

skills.name: Clients & CRM
skills.description: Search and create client records with near-match duplicate detection. Query linked HubSpot deals and discover which projects are associated with a CRM deal.
examples: Search for clients matching 'Contoso'
Create a new client called 'Blue Horizon Ltd'
Which Constellation projects are linked to HubSpot deal 12345?
Show me open CRM deals above $50k
